text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: At no stage of the ongoing or previous negotiations has the issue of transferring Iran’s enriched uranium stockpiles to the United States or any other country been raised, and fundamentally, this option is not on the agenda of the Islamic Republic of Iran.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：在当前或此前的任何谈判阶段，从未提出过将伊朗浓缩铀库存转移至美国或任何其他国家的问题，从根本上讲，这一选项不在伊朗伊斯兰共和国的议程之内。

text: WarMonitor RT @ukraine_map : The Status of Russia’s Top 10 Oil Refineries 1. Omsk 425k bpd - Working 🟢 2. Kirishi 355k bpd - Damaged 🟠 3. Taneco 340k bpd - Working 🟢 4. Yaroslavl 300k bpd - Damaged 🟠 5. Ryazan 295k bpd - Damaged 🟠 6. Volgalad 287k bpd - Working 🟢 7. Kstovo 262k bpd - Damaged 🟠 8. Perm 260k bpd - Working 🟢 9. Tuapse 240k bpd - Destroyed ❌ 10. Moscow 230k bpd - Working 🟢 Half of Russia’s top 10 largest oil refineries, responsible for 55% of Russia’s oil refining capacity are seriously damaged, with one mostly destroyed as of April 20, 2026 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @ukraine_map ：俄罗斯前十大炼油厂状况 1. 鄂木斯克 42.5万桶/日 - 运行中 🟢 2. 基里希 35.5万桶/日 - 受损 🟠 3. Taneco 34万桶/日 - 运行中 🟢 4. 雅罗斯拉夫尔 30万桶/日 - 受损 🟠 5. 梁赞 29.5万桶/日 - 受损 🟠 6. 伏尔加格勒 28.7万桶/日 - 运行中 🟢 7. 克斯托沃 26.2万桶/日 - 受损 🟠 8. 彼尔姆 26万桶/日 - 运行中 🟢 9. 图阿普谢 24万桶/日 - 被摧毁 ❌ 10. 莫斯科 23万桶/日 - 运行中 🟢 截至2026年4月20日，俄罗斯前十大炼油厂中有一半严重受损，这些炼油厂占俄罗斯炼油能力的55%，其中一家基本被毁。推文

text: WarMonitor Sweden’s intel chief says Russia needs oil above $100 a barrel for a year just to close its budget gap, warning the current revenue boost from the Middle East war, up to $150M daily, won’t last. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046136790525108404/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 瑞典情报主管表示，俄罗斯需要油价维持在每桶100美元以上一年才能填补其预算缺口，并警告称，目前中东战争带来的每日高达1.5亿美元的收入增长不会持续。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046136790525108404/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei accused the United States of sabotaging diplomacy and called the attack on an Iranian commercial ship an “act of aggression.” “The United States, through its contradictory behavior and continuous violation of the ceasefire provisions, has shown that it does not take the diplomatic track seriously.” “Washington's recent actions, including breaching agreements in Lebanon and attempting to impose a naval blockade on Iran, which led to the attack on our country's commercial ship, are a clear example of an ‘aggressive act’ in accordance with UN resolutions.” “This clear contradiction between words and deeds reinforces the Iranian people’s doubts about the intentions of the United States. Therefore, Iran, giving priority to national interests, will make the appropriate decision on continuing the course of negotiations.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊指责美国破坏外交，并将针对伊朗商船的袭击称为“侵略行为”。“美国通过其自相矛盾的行为和持续违反停火条款的表现，表明它并未认真对待外交途径。”“华盛顿近期的行动，包括违反黎巴嫩协议并试图对伊朗实施海上封锁，导致了针对我国商船的袭击，这是根据联合国决议界定的‘侵略行为’的明确例证。”“这种言行之间明显的矛盾加深了伊朗人民对美国意图的怀疑。因此，伊朗在优先考虑国家利益的情况下，将就继续谈判进程做出适当决定。”推文

text: WarMonitor Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei says the country has no plans for another round of negotiations at this time. https://x.com/clashreport/status/2046132966363897923/video/1 tweet

text: The Spectator Index Iranian foreign ministry says the country has not received a serious offer with regards to lifting sanctions tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗外交部表示，该国尚未收到关于解除制裁的严肃提议。推文

text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: The Islamic Republic of Iran does not recognize any deadlines or ultimatums in securing its national interests. Safeguarding national interests will continue for as long as necessary, and in the event of any new adventurism by the United States or the Zionist regime, the armed forces will respond decisively with full capability.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：伊朗伊斯兰共和国在维护国家利益方面不承认任何最后期限或最后通牒。维护国家利益的行动将根据需要持续进行，如果美国或犹太复国主义政权采取任何新的冒险行动，武装部队将以全部能力果断予以回击。

text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: At the moment, we have not decided on our participation in the next round of negotiations.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：目前，我们尚未决定是否参加下一轮谈判。

text: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baghaei: We have no plans for the next round of negotiations.
text_zh: 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊：我们没有关于下一轮谈判的计划。

text: The Spectator Index Iran's foreign ministry says there are no current plans of further talks with the United States tweet
text_zh: 《旁观者指数》：伊朗外交部表示目前没有与美国进行进一步会谈的计划。推文

text: Open Source Intel China expresses concern over U.S. seizure of an Iranian ship. Iran: The vessel struck by U.S. forces was traveling from China to Iran - Open Source Intel tweet

text: Open Source Intel Iran is considering a law that would ban Israeli-linked ships from the Strait of Hormuz, require hostile nations to get security council approval before transit, and charge all passing vessels a fee in rials, 30% of which would fund the IRGC and armed forces. Countries deemed to have "caused damage" to Iran would be blocked until compensation is paid. - Fars News. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗正在考虑一项法律，该法律将禁止与以色列有关联的船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，要求敌对国家在过境前获得安理会批准，并对所有过境船只收取里亚尔费用，其中30%将用于资助伊斯兰革命卫队和武装部队。被认为对伊朗“造成损害”的国家将被封锁，直到支付赔偿金。 - 法尔斯通讯社。推文

text: Visioner 🇷🇺 🛢️ 🔥 The oil refinery in the city of Tuapse, Krasnodar Krai, Russia, is still burning after yesterday's attack by Ukrainian kamikaze drones, and the scale of the fire is increasing... https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046125114010272006/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇷🇺 🛢️ 🔥 俄罗斯克拉斯诺达尔边疆区图阿普谢市的炼油厂在昨天遭到乌克兰自杀式无人机袭击后仍在燃烧，火势规模正在扩大... https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046125114010272006/video/1 推文

text: US Navy Attacks & Seizes Iranian Ship Near Hormuz The U.S. Navy seized an Iranian-flagged ship after a six-hour standoff near the Gulf of Oman. Iran vowed a response, raising tensions as a ceasefire nears expiry & the blockade dispute deepens. READ MORE
text_zh: 美国海军在霍尔木兹附近袭击并扣押伊朗船只：美国海军在阿曼湾附近经过六小时的对峙后，扣押了一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的船只。伊朗誓言要做出回应，随着停火协议即将到期且封锁争端加剧，紧张局势升级。阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇦🇿 🇹🇷 Mossad, the IDF, and the Shin Bet issued a joint statement saying an Iranian-linked cell attempted to attack a strategic oil pipeline supplying Israel via Azerbaijan, Georgia, and Turkey. Authorities state the network also planned attacks on Jewish and Israeli targets in Azerbaijan, including the Israeli embassy and a synagogue in Baku, with suspects arrested in possession of explosive drones and charges. The agencies say the activity was directed by the IRGC’s overseas operations unit, adding that several senior operatives involved in the network were killed during recent Israeli operations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇦🇿 🇹🇷 摩萨德、以色列国防军和辛贝特发表联合声明称，一个与伊朗有关联的团伙试图袭击一条经由阿塞拜疆、格鲁吉亚和土耳其向以色列供应石油的战略输油管道。当局表示，该网络还计划袭击阿塞拜疆境内的犹太和以色列目标，包括以色列驻巴库大使馆和一座犹太教堂，嫌疑人在被捕时持有爆炸性无人机和炸药。各机构称，这些活动是由伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的海外行动部门指挥的，并补充说，参与该网络的几名高级特工在最近的以色列行动中被击毙。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Judiciary Chief: "Iran has not conceded even an iota of the nation's rights and will not do so." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046122317500088618/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗司法部长：“伊朗没有放弃哪怕一丁点国家的权利，将来也不会这样做。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046122317500088618/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Mossad says it thwarted an Iranian backed plot a few weeks ago targeting the Baku–Tbilisi–Ceyhan pipeline, along with Jewish and Israeli sites in Azerbaijan. According to the agency, the cell planned attacks on the Israeli embassy, a synagogue in Baku, and Jewish community leaders. Azerbaijani authorities arrested the operatives and seized explosive drones and fragmentation devices smuggled into the country. Mossad says the network conducted surveillance and collected intelligence on targets under direct guidance from handlers in Iran. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 摩萨德称，几周前挫败了一起由伊朗支持的针对巴库-第比利斯-杰伊汉输油管道以及阿塞拜疆境内犹太和以色列目标的阴谋。据该机构称，该团伙计划袭击以色列驻巴库大使馆、一座犹太教堂和犹太社区领袖。阿塞拜疆当局逮捕了这些特工，并查获了走私入境的爆炸性无人机和破片装置。摩萨德表示，该网络在伊朗境内操纵者的直接指导下，对目标进行了监视和情报收集。推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese journalist Nadim Koteich: "The Gulf countries tried everything to appease Iran, but were still attacked. This war was inevitable. The world has changed, and in this war we are in the same trench with Israel." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046121421269598686/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 黎巴嫩记者纳迪姆·科泰什（Nadim Koteich）：“海湾国家尝试了一切办法来安抚伊朗，但仍然遭到了袭击。这场战争是不可避免的。世界已经改变，在这场战争中，我们与以色列站在同一战壕里。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046121421269598686/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah claims its fighters carried out an IED ambush on an IDF armored column moving from Taybeh to Deir Siriane on April 19. According to the statement, explosions in two waves between 3:40 PM and 4:40 PM “destroyed 4 Merkava” tanks, which later burned before being withdrawn around 6 PM. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党声称其武装人员于4月19日对一支从泰贝（Taybeh）向代尔西里安（Deir Siriane）移动的以色列国防军装甲纵队实施了简易爆炸装置伏击。根据声明，下午3:40至4:40之间的两波爆炸“摧毁了4辆梅卡瓦”坦克，这些坦克随后起火，并于下午6点左右被撤回。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah isn't the only one bleeding. Amal Movement buried its dead in a mass funeral in southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046119909000691742/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 不仅仅是真主党在流血。阿迈勒运动在黎巴嫩南部为死者举行了集体葬礼。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046119909000691742/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF says it struck a primed Hezbollah rocket launcher in Qalaouiyah, southern Lebanon, overnight. The loaded launcher was north of the forward defense line and "posed an immediate threat to IDF troops and Israeli citizens." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046119153644274070/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列国防军称，昨晚袭击了黎巴嫩南部卡拉乌耶（Qalaouiyah）的一个已准备就绪的真主党火箭发射器。该装载的发射器位于前沿防线以北，“对以色列国防军部队和以色列公民构成了直接威胁”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046119153644274070/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇷🇺 BREAKING! The FSB reports a terrorist attack has been thwarted in Stavropol, with a German national among those involved. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇷🇺 A German citizen wanted to blow up a law enforcement facility in Pyatigorsk on orders from Kiev The terrorist attack was planned for the morning to kill as many law enforcement officers as possible, the FSB reported. ➡️ The explosive with a power of 1.5 kg in TNT equivalent was in the backpack of the perpetrator. ➡️ The bomb was supposed to be detonated remotely by a citizen of one of the Central Asian countries, who was nearby. And the perpetrator of the terrorist attack, according to Kiev's plan, would have died on the spot. ➡️ Law enforcement officers detained both of them, and they gave confessions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇷🇺 突发！俄罗斯联邦安全局（FSB）报告称，斯塔夫罗波尔的一起恐怖袭击已被挫败，其中一名涉案人员为德国公民。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐款 | 广告” 🇷🇺 一名德国公民受基辅指使，企图炸毁皮亚季戈尔斯克的一处执法设施。据俄罗斯联邦安全局报告，此次恐怖袭击原计划在早晨实施，旨在尽可能多地杀伤执法人员。➡️ 肇事者背包内装有当量为1.5公斤TNT的爆炸物。➡️ 该炸弹原定由附近的一名中亚国家公民远程引爆。按照基辅的计划，恐怖袭击的实施者将当场死亡。➡️ 执法人员将两人逮捕，他们均已供认不讳。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Rybar in English: Fwd from @ 📝 Tragic end of a special operation 📝 On the deaths of U.S. embassy employees in Mexico A car crash in the Mexican state of Chihuahua claimed the lives of four people. A vehicle carrying two U.S. embassy employees and two Mexican officers went off the road in a mountainous area. The group was returning after a successful joint operation in Chihuahua. Law enforcement managed to discover and eliminate six major underground methamphetamine production laboratories , including one of the largest complexes in the country. Among the dead was the head of the local Investigation Agency Pedro Roman Osegera Cervantes . 📌 U.S. Ambassador to Mexico Ronald Johnson reported this. He is a former special forces officer and CIA operative whom Donald Trump deliberately appointed to this position for a tough crackdown on drug cartels. Under his tenure, Americans secured permission from the Mexican government for joint military operations against drug labs. 🖍 Given the circumstances of their deaths, a fair question arises: was this really an accident? Social media users actively claim that the Americans were killed by members of a drug cartel , and the deceased were employees of a drug enforcement agency. ❗️ Such an assumption, especially considering historical precedent and the recent operation to kill the head of "New Generation Jalisco" El Mencho, seems quite plausible. And to avoid acknowledging the murder and causing panic, the Americans could have covered it up. #Mexico #USA 🇺🇸 @rybar_america — making America understandable again 💸 Support us Original msg
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Rybar in English: 转发自 @ 📝 特别行动的悲惨结局 📝 关于美国驻墨西哥大使馆员工死亡事件 墨西哥奇瓦瓦州发生一起车祸，造成四人死亡。一辆载有两名美国大使馆员工和两名墨西哥警官的车辆在山区冲出道路。该小组在奇瓦瓦州成功完成联合行动后正在返回途中。执法部门成功发现并捣毁了六个大型地下甲基苯丙胺生产实验室，其中包括该国最大的综合设施之一。死者中包括当地调查局局长佩德罗·罗曼·奥塞格拉·塞万提斯（Pedro Roman Osegera Cervantes）。 📌 美国驻墨西哥大使罗纳德·约翰逊（Ronald Johnson）报告了此事。他曾是一名特种部队军官和中央情报局特工，唐纳德·特朗普特意任命他担任此职，以严厉打击贩毒集团。在他任职期间，美国人获得了墨西哥政府的许可，可以针对毒品实验室进行联合军事行动。 🖍 鉴于他们死亡的情况，一个合理的问题出现了：这真的是一场意外吗？社交媒体用户积极声称美国人是被贩毒集团成员杀害的，而死者是缉毒机构的员工。 ❗️ 这种假设，特别是考虑到历史先例以及最近针对“哈利斯科新一代”贩毒集团头目“埃尔·门乔”（El Mencho）的暗杀行动，似乎相当可信。为了避免承认谋杀并引起恐慌，美国人可能掩盖了真相。 #墨西哥 #美国 🇺🇸 @rybar_america — 让美国再次变得可以理解 💸 支持我们 原消息

text: 🇱🇧 An Israeli occupation soldier posted photos of herself picking vegetables and cooking inside a home in southern Lebanon — while its owners remain banned from returning. The house still had food in the kitchen. The garden was still alive. Everything was exactly as the family left it — except the family. In their place, a soldier in full uniform, laughing, making herself at home. Fifty-five villages in southern Lebanon remain closed to their residents. The people who planted those gardens, built those kitchens, and filled those homes are not allowed back. Someone else is eating their food. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 一名以色列占领军士兵发布了自己在黎巴嫩南部一户人家中采摘蔬菜和做饭的照片——而这户房子的主人仍被禁止返回。厨房里还有食物。花园依然生机勃勃。一切都和这家人离开时一模一样——除了这家人。取而代之的是一名全副武装、欢声笑语、把这里当成自己家的士兵。黎巴嫩南部的五十五个村庄仍对居民关闭。那些种植这些花园、建造这些厨房、填满这些家园的人不被允许回来。其他人正在吃他们的食物。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Israeli Army Radio: Israeli officials say that if no agreement is reached on Iran’s missile programme, another round of strikes targeting Iran’s missile industry is viewed as likely within the coming years. They add that an Iran possessing thousands of missiles is considered a “red line,” warning that if it is crossed, “an attack would be required.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 以色列陆军电台：以色列官员表示，如果无法就伊朗的导弹计划达成协议，未来几年内很可能会对伊朗的导弹工业进行新一轮打击。他们补充说，拥有数千枚导弹的伊朗被视为一条“红线”，并警告说如果越过这条红线，“就需要进行攻击”。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇱🇧 The destruction caused by Israel in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇱🇧 This is what's left of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon — after Israel finished "defending itself." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical Russia's Tuapse oil refinery and Black Sea oil export terminal tank farm continues to suffer a catastrophic fire this morning after an overnight Ukrainian drone raid. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046114169896701965/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 俄罗斯图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂和黑海石油出口码头油罐区在经历了一夜的乌克兰无人机袭击后，今天早上继续遭受灾难性火灾。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046114169896701965/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @FaytuksNetwork : Tom Barrack, the US ambassador to Turkiye and envoy to Iraq and Syria, says that "benevolent monarchies" are the only successful system in the Middle East, advising against "putting on the cloak of democracy," saying the world "only respects one thing: power" - NYT tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @FaytuksNetwork：美国驻土耳其大使兼伊拉克和叙利亚特使汤姆·巴拉克（Tom Barrack）表示，“仁慈的君主制”是中东唯一成功的制度，建议不要“披上民主的外衣”，并称世界“只尊重一件事：权力” - 纽约时报推文

text: Israeli army warns residents of southern Lebanon not to head south of 21 villages and not to return to 58 others The 58 are outside of the fake red zone
text_zh: 以色列军队警告黎巴嫩南部居民不要前往21个村庄以南的地区，也不要返回其他58个村庄。这58个村庄位于虚假的红区之外。

text: ↩️ Reply to الإعلام الحربي في المقاومة الإسلامية: "بِسْمِ اللَّـهِ الرحمن الرَّحِيمِ‏﴿أُذِنَ لِلَّذِينَ يُقَٰتَلُونَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ظُلِمُوا۟ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ نَصْرِهِمْ لَقَدِيرٌ﴾‏صَدَقَ اللهُ العَلِيّ العَظِيم" Wonderful Going back to the 15 month era is unacceptable and traitorous This proves we are on the right track hamdella.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 伊斯兰抵抗运动军事媒体：“奉至仁至慈的真主之名，‘被进攻者已获准抵抗，因为他们受了压迫。真主对于援助他们，确是全能的。’至高无上的真主所言极是。” 太棒了，回到15个月前的时代是不可接受且背叛的行为。这证明我们走在正确的道路上，感谢真主。

text: 🇦🇪 The United Arab Emirates has warned U.S. officials that without access to dollar liquidity, it may shift oil transactions to Chinese yuan — a direct threat to dollar dominance in global energy markets. U.A.E. Central Bank Governor Khaled Mohamed Balama raised the prospect of a currency swap line with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Federal Reserve officials on the sidelines of last week's IMF and World Bank meetings in Washington. Emirati officials framed the request as precautionary but argued that Trump's decision to strike Iran dragged their country into a conflict it did not choose. Iran fired over 2,800 drones and missiles at the U.A.E. before a ceasefire took effect April 17, damaging oil infrastructure and blocking tanker access through the Strait of Hormuz. The dirham is pegged to the dollar and backed by $270 billion in reserves, but analysts warn of capital flight and volatility risks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇦🇪 阿拉伯联合酋长国已向美国官员发出警告，如果无法获得美元流动性，可能会将石油交易转向人民币——这对美元在全球能源市场的主导地位构成了直接威胁。阿联酋央行行长哈立德·穆罕默德·巴拉马在上周华盛顿国际货币基金组织和世界银行会议期间，向财政部长斯科特·贝森特和美联储官员提出了建立货币互换额度的可能性。阿联酋官员将此请求描述为预防性措施，但辩称特朗普打击伊朗的决定将他们的国家拖入了一场非其所愿的冲突。在4月17日停火生效前，伊朗向阿联酋发射了超过2800架无人机和导弹，破坏了石油基础设施并封锁了油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡的通道。迪拉姆与美元挂钩，并有2700亿美元的储备作为支撑，但分析人士警告称存在资本外逃和波动风险。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇧🇬 🇪🇺 Former President Rumen Radev, projected to win Bulgaria's election by a wide margin according to exit polls, said Europe has fallen victim to its own ambition to be a moral leader. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics 🇧🇬 🇪🇺 前总统鲁门·拉德夫（Rumen Radev）在出口民调中以巨大优势预计将赢得保加利亚大选，他表示欧洲已成为其自身渴望成为道德领袖这一野心的受害者。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel The Israeli military says it struck a primed Hezbollah rocket launcher north of the “forward defense line” in southern Lebanon overnight, saying the loaded launcher in the Qalaouiyah area “posed an immediate threat to IDF troops and Israeli citizens.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046105267213865083/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 以色列军方称，昨晚在黎巴嫩南部“前沿防线”以北打击了一个已准备就绪的真主党火箭发射器，并表示位于卡拉乌亚（Qalaouiyah）地区的装载发射器“对以色列国防军部队和以色列公民构成了直接威胁”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046105267213865083/video/1 推文

text_zh: 美国中央司令部发布了美国海军陆战队登上一艘被扣押的伊朗船只的视频。

text: Kim Jong Un oversaw tests of upgraded short-range ballistic missiles designed to carry cluster and fragmentation warheads, state media reported.
text_zh: 据官方媒体报道，金正恩视察了旨在携带集束和破片弹头的升级版短程弹道导弹的测试。

text: Ukrainian drones struck the Tuapse oil refinery in Russia’s Krasnodar Krai overnight, causing a major fire.
text_zh: 乌克兰无人机连夜袭击了俄罗斯克拉斯诺达尔边疆区的图阿普谢炼油厂，引发了一场大火。

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) An enormous cloud of smoke rising over the Russian city of Tuapse due to a fire at the local oil refinery caused by Ukrainian strikes. The pile of black smoke rising hundreds of meters into the air. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046094070200582253/video/1 Absolutely massive fire at the Tuapse oil refinery located in southern Russia following Ukrainian strikes last night. Several fuel tanks seen burning. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046091825757192289/video/1 - Status-6 (War & Military News) tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）由于乌克兰的袭击导致当地炼油厂发生火灾，俄罗斯图阿普谢市上空升起巨大的烟云。黑烟柱升至数百米高空。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046094070200582253/video/1 昨晚乌克兰袭击后，位于俄罗斯南部的图阿普谢炼油厂发生极其猛烈的火灾。可以看到几个燃料罐正在燃烧。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2046091825757192289/video/1 - Status-6（战争与军事新闻）推文
